summary: Comprehensive testing of Node.js backend migration completed. All 29 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI tests passed for all critical flows including homepage, login, registration, booking calendar, and logout.
passed_tests: Backend: Login with valid credentials (max@test.ch / test123)
Backend: Login rejection with invalid credentials
Backend: Login rejection with invalid email format
Backend: Get current user with token
Backend: User registration with unique email
Backend: Pricing endpoint returns all 5 options correctly
Backend: 12h weekday pricing (CHF 120 member / CHF 180 external)
Backend: 12h weekend pricing (CHF 150 member / CHF 270 external)
Backend: 24h weekday pricing (CHF 150 member / CHF 230 external)
Backend: 24h weekend pricing (CHF 200 member / CHF 350 external)
Backend: Cleaning fee (CHF 60) and deposit (CHF 250) correct
Backend: Check availability for valid future date
Backend: Far future (>3 months) booking rejection
Backend: External booking creation with contact info
Backend: External booking rejection without required fields
Frontend: Homepage loads with events, board members, Robihütte teaser
Frontend: Login flow with test credentials
Frontend: User registration creates new account
Frontend: Robihütte page displays all 5 pricing options
Frontend: Calendar shows busy/free dates with color coding
Frontend: Guest booking banner displayed for non-logged users
critical_code_review_comments: Node.js backend migration successful - all API endpoints preserved and functional
JWT secret key warning in logs (19 bytes, recommended 32 bytes) - consider using longer secret in production
context_for_next_testing_agent: Node.js backend migration from Python/FastAPI is complete and fully functional. All 29 backend tests pass. Frontend React code unchanged and working correctly with new backend. Test user max@test.ch/test123 available for testing.
